text:

Author: brueffer

Log:
  MFH: r277085

  Fix a typo in the FFS maxbpg option, it was erroneously spelled maxbpf.

  The error has been reported to and fixed in the NetBSD upstream version as well.

  PR:             196598
  Submitted by:   Dan McGregor
